text.title: Infrastructure as Code Basics Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply `Infrastructure as Code Basics` end-to-end. Each step has an input, an action, an output, and (where relevant) a decision gate.

step.name: pick-tool
step.action: Evaluate Terraform vs Pulumi vs CDK; record alternatives_considered.

step.name: pick-state-and-secrets
step.action: Choose remote state backend + secret strategy.

step.name: ci-and-baseline
step.action: Configure WIF/OIDC; vendor baseline modules; commit.
